message:
test(bd-1o57): add handler trait and mounted wrapper tests

Cover ProgressNotificationSender dispatch (with/without total/message),
BidirectionalSenders builder, create_context_with_progress all 4 branches,
ToolHandler/ResourceHandler/PromptHandler default methods and sync call,
MountedToolHandler/MountedResourceHandler/MountedPromptHandler name/uri
override and delegation (0 → 28 tests).
